reasoning: Bitcoin is currently trading well above $100,000 as of late October/early November 2025, continuing to hold support near $100,000-$113,000. Since this question covers the period from December 30, 2024 to December 31, 2025, and there have been no reports of a drop to $50,000 during this time, the condition has not yet been met. With less than 2 months remaining until expiration (Nov 9 to Dec 31, 2025), a 55%+ catastrophic collapse from current levels would require an exogenous black swan event or a massive flash crash specifically on the Binance BTC/USDT pair. Given the remaining time and structural support, the probability of hitting $50,000 or lower is extremely marginal and essentially limited to the baseline historical likelihood of unprecedented flash crashes or sudden macro panics. I am estimating this tail risk at 5%.
